fields.name: Buy-from Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the no. of the vendor who delivered the items.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the invoice that this line belongs to.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the invoice line number.
The program filled in the field automatically and used the number to keep track of the lines.
You cannot change the number because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line type.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the location where the invoice line is registered.

fields.name: Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the inventory posting group or FA posting group used when the invoice was posted.
The program copies the posting group from the Posting Group field on the purchase line.
The posting group tells the program which accounts to post to.
You cannot change the posting group because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Expected Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the items were expected.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies either the name of, or a description of, the item or general ledger account.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies information in addition to the description.

fields.name: Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the item or resource's unit of measure, such as piece or hour.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity posted from the line.

fields.name: Direct Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the selected item or resource.

fields.name: Unit Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost, in LCY, of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: VAT %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT %.

fields.name: Line Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the discount percentage that is granted for the item on the line.

fields.name: Line Discount Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the discount amount that is granted for the item on the line.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line's net amount.

fields.name: Amount Including VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net amount, including VAT, for this line.

fields.name: Unit Price (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price, in LCY, of one unit of the item or resource. You can enter a price manually or have it entered according to the Price/Profit Calculation field on the related card.

fields.name: Allow Invoice Disc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the invoice line could have been included in an invoice discount calculation.

fields.name: Gross Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the gross weight of one unit of the item. In the purchase statistics window, the gross weight on the line is included in the total gross weight of all the lines for the particular purchase document.

fields.name: Net Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net weight of one unit of the item. In the purchase statistics window, the net weight on the line is included in the total net weight of all the lines for the particular purchase document.

fields.name: Units per Parcel
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units per parcel of the item. In the purchase statistics window, the number of units per parcel on the line helps to determine the total number of units for all the lines for the particular purchase document.

fields.name: Unit Volume
fields.tooltip: Specifies the volume of one unit of the item. In the purchase statistics window, the volume of one unit of the item on the line is included in the total volume of all the lines for the particular purchase document.

fields.name: Appl.-to Item Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry that the document or journal line is applied to.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Job No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project.

fields.name: Indirect Cost %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of the item's last purchase cost that includes indirect costs, such as freight that is associated with the purchase of the item.

fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the order number this line is associated with.

fields.name: Pay-to Vendor No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the vendor that you paid for the items.
The program copies the number from the Pay-to Vendor No. field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the number because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Inv. Discount Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total calculated invoice discount amount for the line.

fields.name: Vendor Item No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies either the vendor's item number for the item or the item number in your item table.
The program copies the number from the Vendor Item No. field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the number because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's or customer's trade type to link transactions made for this business partner with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's product type to link transactions made for this item with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: VAT Calculation Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies which VAT calculation type was used when this line was posted.
The program copies the code from the VAT Calculation Type field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Type
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transaction type of the purchase line that this line was posted from.
The program copies the transaction type from the Transaction Type field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the transaction type because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Transport Method
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transport method of the purchase line that this line was posted from.
The program copies the transport method from the Transport Method field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the transport method because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Attached to Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the extended text line number that is attached to the purchase line.
The program copies the extended text line number from the Attached to Line No. field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Entry Point
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code of the port of entry where the items pass into your country/region.
The program copies the code from the Entry Point field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Area
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the area code used for the items in this line.
The program copies the code from the Area field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Specification
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transaction specification of the purchase line that this line was posted from.
The program copies the transaction specification from the Transaction Specification field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the transaction specification because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Tax Area Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the tax area that is used to calculate and post sales tax.

fields.name: Tax Liable
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the customer or vendor is liable for sales tax.

fields.name: Tax Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the tax group that is used to calculate and post sales tax.

fields.name: Use Tax
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the purchase is subject to use tax. Use tax is a sales tax that is paid on items that are purchased by a company and are used by that company instead of being sold to a customer.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT specification of the involved customer or vendor to link transactions made for this record with the appropriate general ledger account according to the VAT posting setup.

fields.name: VAT Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT specification of the involved item or resource to link transactions made for this record with the appropriate general ledger account according to the VAT posting setup.

fields.name: Blanket Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the blanket order that the record originates from.

fields.name: Blanket Order Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the blanket order line that the record originates from.

fields.name: VAT Base Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total net amount (amount excluding VAT) that the invoice line consists of. The program copied the amount from the VAT Base Amount field on the purchase line.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit cost of the item on the line. The unit cost is in the currency of the purchase transaction.

fields.name: System-Created Entry
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Line Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net amount, excluding any invoice discount amount, that must be paid for products on the line.

fields.name: VAT Difference
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the VAT difference. The amount displayed in this field is the difference between a VAT amount calculated by the program for a purchase line and a manually entered VAT amount entered by a user for the same purchase line. This may be necessary if you want posted VAT amounts to correspond exactly with an external document you have received.
The program copies the contents of this field from the VAT Difference field in purchase statistics windows.

fields.name: VAT Identifier
fields.tooltip: Copies the contents of this field from the purchase line.

fields.name: IC Partner Ref. Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the item or account in your IC partners company that corresponds to the item or account on the line.
The field is used with the IC Partner Reference field.

fields.name: IC Partner Reference
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the item or account in your IC partners company that corresponds to the item or account on the line.
The field is used with the IC Partner Ref. Type field.
You can select from the following IC partner reference types.


IC Partner Ref. Type


IC Partner Reference


G/L Account

A number from the IC general ledger chart of accounts.


Item

Your item number.


Charge (Item)

Your item charge number.


Cross Reference

An entry from the Item Cross Reference table.


Common Item No.

An entry that is copied from the Common Item No. field on the item card.

fields.name: Prepayment Line
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: IC Partner Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the intercompany partner that the transaction is related to if the entry was created from an intercompany transaction.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date the purchase document was posted.
The program copies the date from the Posting Date field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the posting date because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


You cannot change the contents of this field. Click the drop-down arrow to see the combination of posted dimension values.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.

fields.name: Job Task No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project task.

fields.name: Job Line Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the planning line(s) that was created together with the posting of a job ledger entry from the purchase line.
The program copies the job line type from the Job Line Type field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the job line type because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Job Unit Price
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the unit price of the job ledger entry that was posted from the purchase line. The amount is shown in the currency specified for the job.
The program copies the job unit price from the Job Unit Price field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the job unit price because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Job Total Price
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the total price of the job ledger entry that was posted from the purchase line. The amount is shown in the currency specified for the job.
The program copies the job total price from the Job Total Price field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the job total price because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Job Line Amount
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line amount of the job ledger entry that was posted from the purchase line. The amount is shown in the currency specified for the job.
The program copies the job line amount from the Job Line Amount field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the job line amount because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Job Line Discount Amount
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line discount amount of the job ledger entry that was posted from the purchase line. The amount is shown in the currency specified for the job.
The program copies the job line discount amount from the Job Line Discount Amount field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the job line discount amount because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Job Line Discount %
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line discount percent of the job ledger entry that was posted from the purchase line.
The program copies the job line discount % from the Job Line Discount % field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the job line discount % because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Job Unit Price (LCY)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the unit price of the job ledger entry that was posted from the purchase line. The amount is in local currency.
The program copies the job unit price (LCY) from the Job Unit Price (LCY) field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the job unit price (LCY) because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Job Total Price (LCY)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the total price of the job ledger entry that was posted from the purchase line. The amount is in local currency.
The program copies the job total price (LCY) from the Job Total Price (LCY) field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the job total price (LCY) because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Job Line Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line amount of the job ledger entry that was posted from the purchase line. The amount is in the local currency.
The program copies the job line amount (LCY) from the Job Line Amount (LCY) field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the job line amount (LCY) because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Job Line Disc. Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line discount amount of the job ledger entry that was posted from the purchase line. The amount is in the local currency.
The program copies the job line discount amount (LCY) from the Job Line Discount Amount (LCY) field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the job line discount amount (LCY) because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Job Currency Factor
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Job Currency Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the currency code of the job ledger entry that was posted from the purchase order line.
The code is copied from the Job Currency Code field on the purchase order line.
You cannot change the job currency code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Deferral Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the deferral template that governs how expenses paid with this purchase document are deferred to the different accounting periods when the expenses were incurred.

fields.name: Matched Order Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of purchase order lines to which this posted purchase invoice line is matched.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin where the items are picked or put away.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip:
Specifies quantity per item unit of measure for the item.
The program copies the code from the Qty. per Unit of Measure field on the purchase line.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity expressed in base units of measure, posted from the line.

fields.name: FA Posting Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the FA posting date of the purchase invoice line.
The program copies the date from the FA Posting Date field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the date because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: FA Posting Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting type, if Account Type field contains Fixed Asset.

fields.name: Depreciation Book Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the depreciation book to which the line will be posted if you have selected Fixed Asset in the Type field for this line.

fields.name: Salvage Value
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the salvage value on the purchase invoice line.
The program copies the amount from the Salvage Value field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the salvage value because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Depr. until FA Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies if depreciation was calculated until the FA posting date of the line.

fields.name: Depr. Acquisition Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies if, when this line was posted, the additional acquisition cost posted on the line was depreciated in proportion to the amount by which the fixed asset had already been depreciated.

fields.name: Maintenance Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the maintenance code on the purchase invoice line.
The program copies the code from the Maintenance Code field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Insurance No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the insurance number on the purchase invoice line.

fields.name: Budgeted FA No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of a fixed asset with the Budgeted Asset check box selected. When you post the journal or document line, an additional entry is created for the budgeted fixed asset where the amount has the opposite sign.

fields.name: Duplicate in Depreciation Book
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a depreciation book code if the journal line was posted to a depreciation book in addition to the one in the Depreciation Book Code field.
The program copies the code from the Duplicate in Depreciation Book field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the code because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Use Duplication List
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the purchase line was posted to all depreciation books that have a check mark in the Part of Duplication List field in the Depreciation Book table.
The program copies the contents of the field from the Use Duplication List field on the purchase line.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the responsibility center that serves the vendor on this purchase document.

fields.name: Item Category Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the item category code for the item.
You can use item categories to group default item setup values to make creating new items easier. An item category code specifies the following values:

Default general product posting group.


Default inventory posting group.


Default VAT product posting group.


Default costing method.


To see or select item categories in the Item Category window, click the drop-down arrow in the field.

fields.name: Nonstock
fields.tooltip: Specifies that this item is a catalog item.

fields.name: Purchasing Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the purchasing code for the item.
The program copies the purchasing code from the Purchasing Code field on the purchase line.
A purchasing code indicates any action that was taken to purchase the item on the purchase line.
You cannot change the Purchasing Code field because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Item Reference No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the referenced item number.

fields.name: Non-Deductible VAT Base
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of VAT that is not deducted due to the type of goods or services purchased.

fields.name: Non-Deductible VAT Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the transaction for which VAT is not applied, due to the type of goods or services purchased.

fields.name: Return Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code explaining why the item was returned.

fields.name: Buy-from Vendor Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the vendor who delivered the items.

fields.name: No. of Fixed Asset Cards
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of fixed assets that is being purchased.

fields.name: Overhead Rate
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the overhead rate of this item.
An overhead rate is a fixed amount of indirect cost assigned per quantity (base) of the item.
